dvids.title: Historic 115th Field Hospital transfers command as nation approaches 250th birthday
dvids.desc:
FORT POLK, La. — The 115th Field Hospital, one of the U.S. Army's oldest and most decorated medical units, welcomed a new commander during a time-honored change of command ceremony at the Joint Readiness Training Center and Fort Polk, July 2, 2026.

Lt. Col. Steven P. Delgado assumed command of the
